servinfo.title: Side-Air Bag (Inflator) Module Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Side-Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation

attention1.ptxt: Failure to take proper precautions when inspecting the side air bag (inflator) module can result in personal injury due to accidental deployment of the air bag.
Never attempt to measure the resistance of the air bag (inflator) module.

servinfo.ptxt: Check air bag (inflator) module and if any of the following conditions is found, replace air bag (inflator) module with new one.

item.ptxt: Air bag (inflator) module is damaged or a strong impact was applied to it.
Bend or deformity of air bag (inflator) module bracket.
